{{Infobox starship
| name = Heart of the Aion
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Heart of the Aion]] is a [[Navigator]]'s ship.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Heart of the Aion]] is a ship.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Heart of the Aion]] is a momentous presence with power and accumulated history.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
